result.markdown:
---
title: "About Me"
---
I am a Ph.D.-trained scientist with a background in **functional genomics, transcriptional regulation, and variant interpretation**, with a research focus on **GATA2-associated disease mechanisms**.

This project grew out of my doctoral work investigating how pathogenic GATA2 variants alter genome-wide regulatory programs, including enhancer dysregulation and inflammatory signaling. I created this resource to consolidate variant-level evidence and to further develop my skills in computational curation and clinical genomics–adjacent workflows.

I am actively pursuing **industry roles in variant assessment and clinical genomics**, where accurate interpretation and clear communication of genetic evidence directly impact patient care.

---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
1 + 1
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 2
```


:::
:::


You can add options to executable code like this


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 4
```


:::
:::


The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
